CIPHER.1054.cipherString: Imagination is not the exclusive domain of artists, but belongs in varying degrees to all men.
CIPHER.1054.question: George Henry Lewes offers an observation that has been encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1054.author: George Henry Lewes

CIPHER.1055.cipherString: A single word even may be a spark of inextinguishable thought.
CIPHER.1055.question: Someone left this encrypted quote scribbled on the chalkboard before class began. It's a quote by Percy Bysshe Shelley, written as an Atbash. What does it say?
CIPHER.1055.author: Percy Bysshe Shelley

CIPHER.1056.cipherString: There's a consistency in my work that pops up independent of the limitations of the technology.
CIPHER.1056.question: A phrase by Douglas Trumbull has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1056.author: Douglas Trumbull

CIPHER.1057.cipherString: Half the ease of life oozes away through the leaks of unpunctuality.
CIPHER.1057.question: A piece of wisdom has been encoded as a Porta cipher using a keyword of PIPES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1057.author: Anon

CIPHER.1058.cipherString: We are all more blind to what we have than to what we have not.
CIPHER.1058.question: Audre Lorde was heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword of ADMIT and polybius key of PERCEIVING. What does it say?
CIPHER.1058.author: Audre Lorde

CIPHER.1059.cipherString: Beyond his own sure knowledge, he had not a shred of proof.
CIPHER.1059.question: While analyzing the background noise from a physics experiment, you detect this pattern. It's a quote by Clifford D. Simak, encoded using a Baconian. What does it say?
CIPHER.1059.author: Clifford D. Simak

CIPHER.1060.cipherString: My teacher was talking about excuses and told me to not tell her that my homework grew legs and flew away.
CIPHER.1060.question: The janitor found this strange paper strip under a Bunsen burner. It's a quote, encoded with a Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1060.author: Unknown

CIPHER.1061.cipherString: He has looked long at the stars, and that is the beginning of wisdom.
CIPHER.1061.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote by Chad Oliver, encrypted as a Nihilist Substitution with a keyword length of 5. The 6th through 15th cipher units (59 54 37 74 30 49 66 37 46 48) decode to be LOOKEDLONG. What does it say?
CIPHER.1061.author: Chad Oliver

CIPHER.1062.cipherString: Never go to a doctor whose office plants have died.
CIPHER.1062.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Erma Bombeck encoded using a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote starts with NEVER. What does it say?
CIPHER.1062.author: Erma Bombeck

CIPHER.1063.cipherString: Skilled or unskilled, we all scribble poems.
CIPHER.1063.question: Found taped under a desk in study hall: this Baconian puzzle by Horace. You are told that the deciphered text starts with SKIL. What does it say?
CIPHER.1063.author: Horace

CIPHER.1064.cipherString: La lucha contra las fuerzas del Mal prosigue pero, en esta ocasiĂłn, el detective esqueleto estĂˇ perdido en una dimensiĂłn paralela.
CIPHER.1064.question: This quote is from the back cover of one of the Spanish-language editions of a Skulduggery Pleasant book. It has been encoded as a Xenocrypt with a K1 keyword. What does it say?

CIPHER.1065.cipherString: The only stable thing is movement.
CIPHER.1065.question: A glitchy hologram in the school planetarium displays this Affine version of Jean Tinguely's words with a=11 and b=4. What does it say?
CIPHER.1065.author: Jean Tinguely

CIPHER.1066.cipherString: Nature knows no indecencies; man invents them.
CIPHER.1066.question: The following symbols encode a phrase by Mark Twain using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1066.author: Mark Twain

CIPHER.1067.cipherString: If you think you've seen it all, put on your sunglasses, because you're about to be surprised.
CIPHER.1067.question: Your school-issued Chromebook's login screen hijacked itself with this Checkerboard quote from Vannetta Chapman with a polybius key of ASTONISHMENT. What does it say?
CIPHER.1067.author: Vannetta Chapman

CIPHER.1068.cipherString: Business is a good game--lots of competition and a minimum of rules. You keep score with money.
CIPHER.1068.question: A famous phrase by Nolan Bushnell has been encoded as an Aristocrat cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1068.author: Nolan Bushnell

CIPHER.1069.question: An explorer's journal mentions a â€śhidden truthâ€ť encoded below. It turns out to be a quote, written in a Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 16949 906537 decode to?

CIPHER.1070.cipherString: I couldn't keep up with the virtual world while living so large in the real world.
CIPHER.1070.question: In the end credits of a video game, you noticed this Atbash sequenceâ€”it's Noah Strycker's words. What does it say?
CIPHER.1070.author: Noah Strycker

CIPHER.1071.cipherString: I am editing myself as we go along
CIPHER.1071.question: Etched into the surface of a melted vinyl record, you found this Affine-encrypted quote by Paul Simon. You are told that the cipher text OU decodes to be MY. What does it say?
CIPHER.1071.author: Paul Simon

CIPHER.1072.cipherString: True silence is the rest of the mind, and is to the spirit what sleep is to the body, nourishment and refreshment.
CIPHER.1072.question: You found the following carved into the bark of a hollow log. You are told that it's a quote by William Penn encoded as a Caesar. What does it say?
CIPHER.1072.author: William Penn

CIPHER.1073.cipherString: Para decidir cuĂˇntos tacos vas a necesitar para la fiesta, llena un barco de tacos y esa serĂˇ la cantidad adecuada.
CIPHER.1073.question: This quote can be found in the description of the Spanish-language edition of the famous book Dragons Love Tacos. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt with an English keyword. What does it say?
CIPHER.1073.translation: To decide how many tacos you will need for the party, fill a boat with tacos and that will be the right amount.

CIPHER.1074.question: The following quote needs to be decoded with the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 639 057134 decode to?

CIPHER.1075.cipherString: I would encourage anyone, regardless of their gender, to pursue their dreams and passions with determination and resilience.
CIPHER.1075.question: Someone taped a piece of paper with this sequence onto the back of a trophy from last year's Science Olympiad. It's an inspirational quote by Yvonne Nelson, written using a Patristocrat Cipher using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains PURSUE corresponding with the ciphertext letters JIBCIU. What does it say?
CIPHER.1075.author: Yvonne Nelson

CIPHER.1076.cipherString: Mathematics is as much an aspect of culture as it is a collection of algorithms.
CIPHER.1076.question: Your lab partner discovered this pattern on the back of a graphing calculator. It's a quote by Carl Boyer, encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has CULTURE somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1076.author: Carl Boyer

CIPHER.1077.cipherString: Gardens are not made by singing 'Oh, how beautiful,' and sitting in the shade.
CIPHER.1077.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Porta quote by Rudyard Kipling. The 51st through 55th cipher characters (RGGVT) decode to be INTHE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1077.author: Rudyard Kipling

CIPHER.1078.cipherString: Celebrity distorts democracy by giving the rich, beautiful, and famous more authority than they deserve.
CIPHER.1078.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Maureen Dowd, written in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1078.author: Maureen Dowd

CIPHER.1079.cipherString: I think its a lot easier to stay driven when you're doing your own project, knowing that there are no limits to how far you can go.
CIPHER.1079.question: Eric Barone (professionally known as ConcernedApe) offers his perspective that has been encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the first line ends with YOU'RE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1079.author: Eric Barone

CIPHER.1080.cipherString: Like a missing tooth, sometimes an absence is more noticeable than a presence.
CIPHER.1080.question: Found inside a hollowed-out periodic table book: this Checkerboard Cipher hides Jodi Picoult's insight. The 42nd through 51st cipher units (TD TL NS ND IA NY UY IS TA NY) decode to be NOTICEABLE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1080.author: Jodi Picoult

CIPHER.1081.cipherString: Time is a slippery thing: lose hold of it once, and its string might sail out of your hands forever.
CIPHER.1081.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Anthony Doerr encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1081.author: Anthony Doerr

CIPHER.1082.cipherString: If you own this story you get to write the ending.
CIPHER.1082.question: A strange code appears in the footer of a document you print from the lab computer. It's a quote by BrenĂ© Brown, encoded in a Fractionated Morse. You are told that the quote has TO WRI in it corresponding to the encoded text M J R K G V, meaning G = â€“â—ŹĂ—; J = â€“â€“Ă—; K = â€“Ă—â—Ź; M = â€“Ă—â€“; R = Ă—â—Źâ€“; V = â—Źâ—ŹĂ—. What does it say?
CIPHER.1082.author: BrenĂ© Brown

CIPHER.1083.cipherString: I do not quote my own movies. I think I would be pretty insufferable if I did.
CIPHER.1083.question: A coded message is discovered inside a fortune cookie. It turns out to be a quote by Diablo Cody, encoded using a Complete Columnar Cipher. The quote has SUFFER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1083.author: Diablo Cody
